description: L3 forbidden operations. Never allowed under any circumstances. Would cause data loss or security breach.

rationale.ecs.delete_server: Destroys compute instance and local data
rationale.css.delete_cluster: Destroys search cluster and all indexed data
rationale.cce.delete_cluster: Destroys container cluster and all workloads
rationale.obs.delete_bucket: Destroys object storage and all objects
rationale.cbr.delete_vault: Destroys backup vault and all backups
